currentEnvironment.label: Current workstation / local dedicated server
currentEnvironment.scumServerProfile: Current local dedicated server configuration on this machine
currentEnvironment.workstationProfile: Windows workstation with live SCUM client window
currentEnvironment.coverageGoal: Baseline verified environment used by the current live matrices.
currentEnvironment.notes: This is evidence for the current workstation only. It is not evidence of environment-independent native proof.

environments.label: Current workstation / local dedicated server
environments.scumServerProfile: Current local dedicated server configuration on this machine
environments.workstationProfile: Windows workstation with live SCUM client window
environments.coverageGoal: Baseline verified environment used by the current live matrices.
environments.notes: This is evidence for the current workstation only. It is not evidence of environment-independent native proof.

environments.label: Current workstation / alternate SCUM server configuration
environments.workstationProfile: Same Windows workstation with live SCUM client window
environments.coverageGoal: Second server configuration sample captured on the current workstation.
environments.notes: This configuration is sampled, but coverage is partial: magazine, ammo, and announce_teleport_spawn proved; water and base weapon still timed out here.

environments.label: Current workstation / RCON runtime attempt
environments.scumServerProfile: Current local dedicated server configuration on this machine
environments.coverageGoal: Capture the representative native-proof matrix through the RCON runtime path.
environments.notes: Blocked on this workstation: live RCON command attempt returned connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:27015, so no second runtime matrix was captured.

environments.label: Additional SCUM server configuration
environments.coverageGoal: Capture the representative native-proof matrix on a server with a different SCUM patch/config/runtime profile than the two sampled configurations already recorded here.
environments.notes: Still needed before claiming broader environment coverage across server configurations.

environments.label: Additional workstation/runtime
environments.coverageGoal: Capture the representative native-proof matrix on another workstation or Windows session/runtime.
environments.notes: Needed before claiming native proof is reproduced beyond this workstation.

experimentalCases.label: ammo-762
experimentalCases.notes: Repeated 2026-03-17 live attempts timed out without a confirmed SCUM.db delta. Representative ammo proof now passes on this workstation with Cal_7_62x39mm_Ammobox, but loose-round IDs Ammo_762 and Cal_7_62x39mm still remain unproved here.
